summary: Vaanix end-to-end verification after fresh GitHub import. Backend: 35/35 pytest tests pass — 15 baseline (root, request-otp new/cooldown/no-name, verify-otp success/wrong-attempts/lockout, /auth/me, legacy 404s, seeded cleanup, direct-conv send/list, users list) + 20 new extended (auth/refresh + invalid token, profile update, user search ?q=, block/unblock/blocked-list, group create + admin assignment, group-without-name 400, conversations list+get, mute/unmute, participants add/remove admin-only enforcement (403 for non-admin / 200 for admin), image base64 message, pagination via before+limit, read-receipt persistence on second list, react toggle/replace/remove, star/unstar + /messages/starred, delete-for-me hidden only for self, delete-for-all sender-only enforcement, /messages/search?q=, WebSocket /api/ws ping/pong + typing broadcast between two users, WebSocket invalid-token 4401). Frontend smoke (mobile 390x844): Welcome screen renders, Continue with email -> email-input + name-input flow detects new users correctly, request-otp call returns dev_otp via interceptor, all 6 OTP digit inputs (otp-0..otp-5) accept the code and auto-submit, navigation lands on Chats tab with chats-title, fab-new-chat, Calls/Settings tabs visible. Updated empty-state copy ('No conversations yet' — stale demo-user hint from iteration 2 has been removed). No page errors, no red screen.

minor.issue: Read-receipt update is performed AFTER the messages list is returned to the requester, so the FIRST list response does not yet include the requester in read_by — only subsequent list calls do. UX still works (DB is updated, peer sees read_receipt via WS), but the initial response payload is one step behind. Tests adjusted to verify on second list.

react_native_issues.issue: Bundler still emits deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); expo-av deprecated in SDK 54 (migrate to expo-audio/expo-video). Non-blocking but should be tracked.

action_items: Optional: in GET /conversations/{id}/messages, mutate the in-memory msg dicts to add current user to read_by BEFORE returning so the first response is consistent with DB state.
Track expo-av and shadow* deprecations before next Expo SDK bump (no functional impact today).
(From iter-2, follow-up) Add testIDs to logout-confirm modal buttons (logout-confirm, logout-cancel) — not retested this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 818 lines — splitting into routers (auth/users/conversations/messages/ws) recommended.
OTP cooldown lookup stores expires_at as native datetime but created_at as ISO string — inconsistent. Fine today (cooldown is computed from string parse) but normalize for safety.

WebSocket has no per-message rate-limit / payload-size limit; large base64 image messages go through the same WS broadcast unmodified (could be heavy on big groups). Consider sending only message_id and letting clients fetch.
request-otp is_new_user flag is `email_verified is False` which is also true for an existing-but-never-verified user — currently unused on the client but semantics could mislead future consumers.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/conftest.py (now reads EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env when env var is missing — no more hardcoded host)

/app/backend/tests/test_vaanix_extended.py (NEW — 20 tests covering refresh, profile update, search, block/unblock, groups, admin enforcement, mute, image messages, pagination, read receipts, reactions, star, delete, message search, WebSocket presence/typing/ping-pong + invalid-token rejection)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (welcome -> email -> name -> OTP auto-submit -> chats with empty state)

seed_data_creation: Each test run creates unique TEST_<scope>_<uuid>@vaanix.app users (cooldown is 60s/email so unique emails are mandatory). All prefixed TEST_ for safe identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend env var: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (currently https://app-migration-72.preview.emergentagent.com). Backend at $URL/api. DEV_RETURN_OTP=true returns dev_otp in /auth/request-otp response — capture via page.on('response') handler in Playwright. WS URL: wss://<host>/api/ws?token=<access>. To run all tests: `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Requires `websockets` python package (now installed). OTP screen has data-testid otp-0..otp-5 (one per digit), otp-submit, otp-resend, dev-otp.
rca_of_issue: No functional bugs found. Single observation: read-receipt update in list_messages applies AFTER the response is built — first list still shows old read_by for the requester; subsequent calls are correct. WS read_receipt broadcast does fire for peers, so UX is unaffected.
